summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin features (iteration 4). All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components working correctly. Admin login redirects to /admin with full Admin Console. User approval/rejection flow fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register with role=venue_owner sets account_status=pending
POST /api/auth/register with role=player sets account_status=active
POST /api/auth/register with role=super_admin blocked (403)
POST /api/auth/login as admin@horizon.com/admin123 works
GET /api/admin/dashboard returns platform stats (requires super_admin)
GET /api/admin/users lists users with filters (role, status)
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/approve changes account_status to active
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/reject changes account_status to rejected
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/suspend changes account_status to suspended
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/activate re-activates a user
GET /api/admin/venues lists all venues
PUT /api/admin/venues/{id}/suspend suspends a venue
PUT /api/admin/venues/{id}/activate re-activates a venue
GET /api/admin/settings returns platform settings
PUT /api/admin/settings updates payment_gateway, commission, plans
PUT /api/admin/change-password updates admin password
Non-admin users get 403 on admin routes
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin with Admin Console
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows Overview, Users, Venues, Settings tabs
Frontend: Overview tab shows stats (users, venues, revenue, commission, pending approvals)
Frontend: Users tab shows pending venue owners with Approve/Reject buttons
Frontend: Users tab filter by status and role works
Frontend: Active users show Suspend button, suspended show Activate button
Frontend: Business name and GST shown for venue owners in Users tab
Frontend: Venues tab shows venues with toggle switch for suspend/activate
Frontend: Settings tab has Payment Gateway section (provider, key_id, key_secret, live mode)
Frontend: Settings tab has Booking Commission section (editable percentage)
Frontend: Settings tab has SaaS Subscription Plans (Free/Basic/Pro with editable fields)
Frontend: Settings tab has Change Admin Password section
Frontend: Venue owner registration shows business name and GST fields
Frontend: Venue owner registration shows pending approval notice
Frontend: Pending venue owner sees 'Account Pending Approval' screen on /owner
Frontend: Approved venue owner can access full owner dashboard
Frontend: Approval triggers notification to venue owner (bell badge shows)

pending_owner.note: Was approved during testing, now active

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed users for testing (TEST_player_*, TEST_owner_*, TEST_approve_*, TEST_reject_*, TEST_activate_*). These can be cleaned up in future iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin feature fully implemented and tested. Key components: 1) Backend admin routes in server.py lines 1034-1191, 2) Frontend SuperAdminDashboard.js with 4 tabs (Overview, Users, Venues, Settings), 3) AuthPage.js updated with business fields for venue owners, 4) VenueOwnerDashboard.js has account_status gate for pending/rejected/suspended. Collections used: users (with account_status field), platform_settings (key='platform'). The test@owner.com user was approved during testing and is now active.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - payment gateway credentials can be saved in settings but not actually used for payments yet

feature_verification.admin_login_redirect_to_admin: VERIFIED - admin@horizon.com logs in and redirects to /admin
feature_verification.admin_dashboard_overview: VERIFIED - Shows total users, active venues, bookings, revenue, commission, platform earnings, pending approvals, recent registrations
feature_verification.admin_users_management: VERIFIED - Filter by all/pending/player/venue_owner/coach, Approve/Reject/Suspend/Activate buttons work
feature_verification.admin_venues_management: VERIFIED - Lists all venues with toggle switch for suspend/activate
feature_verification.admin_settings_payment_gateway: VERIFIED - Razorpay provider, key_id, key_secret (with eye toggle), test/live mode switch
feature_verification.admin_settings_subscription_plans: VERIFIED - Free/Basic/Pro plans with editable price, max_venues, features
feature_verification.admin_change_password: VERIFIED - Password input and Update button, backend validates min 6 chars
feature_verification.venue_owner_registration_fields: VERIFIED - Business name and GST number fields appear when venue_owner selected
feature_verification.venue_owner_pending_notice: VERIFIED - Amber notice about admin approval shown during registration
feature_verification.pending_owner_blocked_dashboard: VERIFIED - Shows 'Account Pending Approval' screen instead of dashboard
feature_verification.approval_enables_dashboard_access: VERIFIED - After approval, owner can access full venue dashboard
feature_verification.approval_creates_notification: VERIFIED - Bell badge shows unread count after approval
